content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 contains "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", an explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive tied to a star rating.
Pierre: Apple explicitly bans offering rewards in exchange for reviews or specifically soliciting 5-star ratings, since this manipulates the review system and misleads other users. The paywall text ties a free week of Premium directly to leaving a 5-star review, which is exactly the pattern Guideline 2.3.9 targets. Remove the reward language entirely and, if you want to prompt reviews, use SKStoreReviewController's neutral system prompt with no incentive attached.
